title: Gauge Feature Target Value

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

I love the new Gauge feature. I really do. I’ve been waiting for this for a while now.

However, I would really like the option to set the Target Value based on an actual formula or number column. Setting it manually is also good, but I really would like the opportunity to actually choose a column.

Let’s get this done!

posts.author: Andoni00 (Andoni)
posts.cookedHtml: Upvoting this! Targets can change and this feature would allow for greater flexibility when using this widget.
